mapper.select: SELECT name, content FROM stocks WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT o.price FROM transactions t JOIN orders o ON t.buy_order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.stock_id = #{stockId} ORDER BY t.created_date DESC LIMIT 1), s.publication_price) - s.prev_price FROM stocks s WHERE s.stock_id = #{stockId}

SELECT COALESCE( ROUND( (COALESCE( (SELECT o.price FROM transactions t JOIN orders o ON t.buy_order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.stock_id = #{stockId} ORDER BY t.created_date DESC LIMIT 1), s.publication_price) - s.prev_price) / NULLIF(s.prev_price, 0) * 100), 0) as ChangeRate FROM stocks s WHERE s.stock_id = #{stockId}
SELECT prev_price FROM stocks WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN content='매수' THEN amount ELSE -amount END), 0) AS amount FROM orders WHERE student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) AND stock_id = #{stockId} AND state='체결'
SELECT total_point FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (content, price, amount, state, created_date, student_id, stock_id) VALUES (#{content}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{state}, NOW(), (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}), #{stockId})
mapper.select: SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_id = #{stockId} AND state = '대기' ORDER BY created_date ASC
SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_id = #{stockId} AND state = '대기' AND content = '매도' ORDER BY created_date ASC
SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_id = #{stockId} AND state = '대기' AND content = '매수' ORDER BY created_date ASC

SELECT order_id, content, price, amount, created_date, state FROM orders WHERE student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) AND stock_id = #{stockId} AND state ='대기' ORDER BY created_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point + #{totalPoint} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - #{totalPoint} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transactions (created_date, buy_order_id, sell_order_id) VALUES (NOW(), #{buyOrderId}, #{sellOrderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET state = '대기' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET state = '체결' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET state = '취소' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT publication_balance, publication_price FROM stocks WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET publication_balance = publication_balance - #{amount} WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, content, price, amount, state, created_date, student_id, stock_id FROM orders WHERE stock_id = #{stockId} AND state = '대기' AND content = #{content} AND price = #{price} AND amount = #{amount} AND student_id != (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
